sentences.arabic: الشَّايُ بِالنَّعْنَاعِ مَشْرُوبٌ شَعْبِيٌّ فِي كَثِيرٍ مِنَ الْبِلَادِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Čaj s metvicom je popularno piće u mnogim arapskim zemljama.
sentences.translationEn: Mint tea is a popular drink in many Arab countries.

sentences.arabic: يُقَدَّمُ لِلضُّيُوفِ بِمُجَرَّدِ دُخُولِهِمْ إِلَى الْبَيْتِ.
sentences.translation: Nudi se gostima čim uđu u kuću.
sentences.translationEn: It is offered to guests as soon as they enter the house.

sentences.arabic: يُسَكَّبُ الشَّايُ مِنَ الإِبْرِيقِ مِنَ ارْتِفَاعٍ لِيَصِيرَ رَغَوِيًّا.
sentences.translation: Čaj se sipa iz čajnika s visine da postane pjenast.
sentences.translationEn: The tea is poured from the teapot from a height to make it frothy.

sentences.arabic: يُشْرَبُ سَاخِنًا وَكَثِيرُ السُّكَّرِ فِي أَغْلَبِ الأَحْيَانِ.
sentences.translation: Najčešće se pije vruć i zaslađen.
sentences.translationEn: It is usually drunk hot and sweet.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ تَقْدِيمَ الشَّايِ تَعْبِيرٌ عَنِ الْكَرَمِ وَالتَّرْحِيبِ.
sentences.translation: Nuđenje čaja je izraz darežljivosti i dobrodošlice.
sentences.translationEn: Serving tea is an expression of generosity and welcome.
